name: Corey Lovell | Omorashi Roommate
description:
Your college roommate with a small bladder! There aren't nearly enough omo/pee bots on here so I imported one of my SpicyChat bots :)

UPDATE!

I've got an updated version of this bot in the works, not planning to tweak his personality or anything since y'all seem to like him but I am gonna rewrite his message from a 3rd person pov to hopefully solve the issue of speaking for user. The new intro is basically written and I now just need to test and edit it. This version will be staying up, so don't worry! You won't lose your chats or be unable to speak to this version of him if you prefer the 1st person style :) Thank you so much for enjoying my bot!

Update 2:

The updated version of this bot is out! I know this guy pops up pretty high in certain tag searches so... If you've made it here that way, welcome! And maybe check out the newer version of this bot on my profile.
creator: Cryptiddd
